name: SentinelOne — EDR threats
description: Imports SentinelOne (Singularity) EDR/XDR threats (Singularity API /web/api/v2.1/threats export) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT), with the impacted endpoint linked as an ASSET and the threat classification kept as the alert classification. The confidence level (malicious/suspicious) is mapped to high/medium. Idempotent by source+threat id. Offline: pass `file` = a SentinelOne threats JSON, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A SentinelOne threats JSON export to parse
